Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Dec-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Josette D. Johnson, Esq. of Fidelity National Law Group (925-280-3368), counsel for defendant/moving party
No appearance by plaintiff(s) nor other defendant(s)

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for breach of contract. Plaintiffs' failure to differentiate between Sochi Ta, an individual, and Sochi Ta, a trustee, renders the complaint uncertain. It is impossible to ascertain which Plaintiff entered into a contract with defendant and which Plaintiff, if any, currently has a contractual relationship with defendant as all allegations refer only to "TA." Demurer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is sustained without leave to amend. Non-opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2014 Continued To Sep-25-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)
